name: DASZFRAME — AI Fragment Portrait Studio
description: DASZFRAME — Transform any portrait into AI-directed fragmented artwork. Opens as a full studio tab.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src https://api.anthropic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com;
